basics.name: Gerald Matthew J. Huff
basics.label: Software Engineer
basics.summary: Graduated with a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science at the University of Hawaii at Manoa. I am proficient in Python, C++, Java, JavaScript, and SQL, with project experience in React, Node.js, and GraphQL. Passionate about writing clean, maintainable code and continuously improving the quality of software. Experienced with Git, GitHub, and CI/CD, and enjoy tackling bugs, refactoring code, and finding ways to make applications more efficient and scalable.

projects.name: Sentiment Analysis
projects.description: Open-source contribution to Kaiaulu analytics platform.
highlights: Integrated transformer-based sentiment analysis into Kaiaulu using Python and Git.
Built a sentiment analysis pipeline for developer comments from JIRA, GitHub, and mailing lists.
Implemented models including BERT, XLNet, RoBERTa, and ALBERT.
Structured the pipeline with modular design principles and clear documentation.

projects.name: Campus Concert
projects.description: Full-stack web application for UH Mānoa students to connect with musicians and organize music sessions.
highlights: Built features for profiles, events, and session participation.
Wrote Mocha unit tests and integrated them into a CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions.
Collaborated on a UI overhaul to improve navigation.
Conducted code reviews and maintained frontend (React) and backend (Node.js) code quality.

projects.name: The King's Fall
highlights: Developed challenging platforming and combat mechanics.
Programmed collision, animation, and combat systems.
Created hazards, traps, and platform mechanics.
Implemented boss mechanics and tuned movement physics.
